query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteNewListing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteTermination,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'sale' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tipo_venda,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'sale' AND dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as venda_com_dteNewListing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'sale' AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as venda_com_dteTermination
FROM properfyProperties

  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteNewListing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_dteTermination,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'sale' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as tipo_venda,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'sale' AND dteNewListing IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as venda_com_dteNewListing,
  SUM(CASE WHEN chrTransactionType = 'sale' AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as venda_com_dteTermination
FROM properfyProperties
